Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}After defeating a Shadow that guards a given floor, a new pathway to the Desert of Doors will be opened there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}This allows you to use the Desert of Doors to travel between completed areas at your leisure.[n]{f 1 1}
